name: Daniel Kim
resumeText: Backend engineer with 3 years of professional experience and recently promoted to a senior title. Solid PostgreSQL skills for day-to-day CRUD work and basic indexing; still growing on advanced tuning and replication. Primary stack is Node.js and TypeScript with some exposure to MySQL. Prefers deep focused solo work and describes himself as introverted; tends to keep heads-down and communicates mostly in writing rather than in meetings. Shipped several internal services reliably and is dependable on deadlines. Limited experience leading large cross-functional groups but open to growing into more collaborative roles over time.
